text: Here in this tilted, modern space, I am engulfed by a strange blend of anticipation and disconnection. People gather in small groups, the orange glow ahead reminding me of a stage or a performance. I feel like an observer on the threshold, not quite belonging to the flow of the room. The open setting prompts curiosity, but also an uncertainty about where to position myself. I am both included and set apart, hovering in the liminal space between engagement and introspection.
